---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A one or two sentence description of the proposed feature.

## Motivation

What problem does this solve, and who does it help?
Include a concrete use case if you can.

## Proposed solution

How you imagine it working.
Code or API sketches are welcome.

```ts
// sketch the API you would want
```

## Alternatives considered

Any other approaches you considered and why they are worse.

## Affected package

- [ ] `mcpose`
- [ ] `@mcpose/audit`
- [ ] `@mcpose/testing`
- [ ] Documentation

## Additional context

Anything else relevant.
Roadmap items already tracked in the README do not need a separate issue unless you want to drive them.
